description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring vibrant, retro-themed artwork and a prominent display screen. The front panel showcases a large, colorful illustration of a spaceship and pixelated alien invaders, referencing the iconic Galaga arcade game. The control panel is equipped with a single joystick and one red button, designed for single-player gameplay, and is angled for ergonomic access. The top of the cabinet features a marquee with the Galaga logo and additional pixel art, illuminated to attract attention. Both side panels are decorated with pixelated graphics of spaceships and enemies, set against a black background with dynamic red and blue streaks. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF, with a hard, smooth, and slightly glossy finish.
description: A classic Galaga arcade game cabinet with vibrant retro artwork, a single joystick and button, and a prominent illuminated marquee. The sides and front are adorned with colorful pixel art of spaceships and invaders.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the pixelated spaceship and enemy graphics, as well as the angled control panel and the illuminated marquee at the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main screen with the Galaga game interface, the detailed front artwork of a spaceship and invaders, and the control panel with a joystick and button.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing similar pixel art graphics and the cabinet's overall shape, with the control panel and marquee visible.
description_view_3: The rear view is plain black with no visible artwork, controls, or features.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and one red button, controls spaced for ergonomic access, black panel with minimal markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the Galaga logo in stylized text with pixel art of enemies and a starburst theme, using bright colors on a black background
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature colorful pixel art of spaceships and enemies, with dynamic red and blue streaks on a black background, matching the Galaga theme
